Hi all, The Originator of the PR (Frederic DUBUY )once wrote to me: "Please submit your version which is much more better." This is what I have done: * Update to Muttprint 0.60. * Some hacks to make it work with perl, version 5.005_03. * Adjusted MASTER_SITES. * Made it portdocs compliant. * Contacted programmer before releasing this version to remove fmt, since the options he has used with fmt won't work with FreeBSDs fmt.
